## Discussion

The corresponding [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFArray] contains the values of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoUnique] binary identifier for every digest algorithm supported in the signature in the same order as in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoDigestAlgorithms] array. # kSecCodeInfoCdHashes

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is an array containing the unique binary identifier for every digest algorithm supported in the signature.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoCdHashes: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFArray] contains the values of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoUnique] binary identifier for every digest algorithm supported in the signature in the same order as in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoDigestAlgorithms] array. The [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoUnique] value contained in this array corresponds to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoDigestAlgorithm] value.
title: kSecCodeInfoCdHashes
